---
title: "decadeal_long_handle"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Quarto

```{r}
decadal_raw <- read_csv(here("data", "lishan_flow.csv"),
                        show_col_types = FALSE)

decadal_long <- decadal_raw |>
  pivot_longer(
    cols      = -tendays,
    names_to  = "year",
    values_to = "Q_cms"
  ) |>
  mutate(
    year   = as.integer(year),
    month  = ceiling(tendays / 3L),
    period = case_when(
      tendays %% 3 == 1 ~ "early",
      tendays %% 3 == 2 ~ "mid",
      tendays %% 3 == 0 ~ "late"
    ),
    era = case_when(
      year >= 1959 & year <= 1995 ~ "EIA",
      year >= 1969 & year <= 2005 ~ "EIA_Difference",
      year >= 1983 & year <= 2019 ~ "Current",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    )
  ) |>
  select(year, month, period, tendays, Q_cms, era)

write_csv(decadal_long, here("data", "lishan_decadal_long.csv"))
cat("Saved:", nrow(decadal_long), "rows\n")

```
